svg.text: Frequency-domain Enhancement | Dual-head Segmentation | Based on DSWFNet + FreqU-FNet
(1) Frequency Branch: Haar DWT + linear 1x1 projections extract high-frequency edge/texture features
(2) BCAM Fusion: horizontal self-attention + vertical gating for spatial-freq fusion
(3) FAL: Daubechies-4 wavelet L1 loss on LH/HL/HH sub-bands (FreqU-FNet)
Dinknet34_less_pool_DualHead decoder weights can be loaded directly
New: freq_branch (~0.5M) + BCAM x2 (~2M) = ~2.5M new params (train from scratch)
New trainable: ~5.5M | With pretrained encoder: total ~21M
